_comment: Map MCP server names (or substrings) to their CLI equivalents. Used to flag MCP servers whose tooling exists as a CLI and could be invoked via Bash instead, costing zero tokens when idle. Match is substring, case-insensitive.

alternatives.note: Use Playwright CLI through Bash. Same capability, no idle token cost.
Puppeteer scripts run via Node + Bash.
GitHub CLI covers issues, PRs, repos, releases.
Google Workspace and GCP have CLIs for most operations.
Drive operations work via rclone or gcloud CLI.
Filesystem MCP duplicates native file tools — usually pure overhead.
HTTP fetching has CLI and native equivalents.
sqlite3 CLI handles queries via Bash.
psql via Bash is faster and lighter than the MCP.
stripe CLI exists for most resources.
